title: ARP-OBERON 2608 Psychological Parameter Map
description: How each control feels emotionally and affects mix 'hug' factor in AM sessions

VCO1-3_Range.psychology: Grounding / Exploration — low = meditative bass hug, high = sparkling inspiration

VCF_Resonance.psychology: Emotional tension builder — higher = vocal-like 'cry' that sits forward yet blends

Mic_Preamp.psychology: Intimacy switch — makes your voice or any input feel personally hugged by the instruments

Special_Osc_Drift.psychology: Human warmth — subtle movement creates living, breathing pads that emotionally connect

2Pole_Dual_Filter.psychology: Velvet glue — thick resonance makes chords hug drums/bass without fighting; 96kHz mode = pure morning magic

Envelope_Curves.psychology: Tempo of emotion — snappy = excitement, lush = calm reflective flow

Preamp_Gain.psychology: Drive into soul — higher = vocals/instruments start to 'embrace' each other in the mix

Log_Limiter_Thresh.psychology: Hidden analog hug — log/exp curve creates smooth, console-style compression that feels safe and musical

Tape_Glue_Amount.psychology: Emotional bonding agent — adds harmonic warmth so everything sits perfectly in the track

Red_Secret_Button.psychology: Moment of revelation — engages full chain; instant 'this is why I make music in the AM' feeling

global_psychology: The entire instrument is tuned so that increasing any 'secret' parameter makes the sound feel more intimate, more alive, and perfectly placed in a mix — vocals and instruments literally 'hug' each other with warm analog glue.
